qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_sector, P.c_departamento, P.d_departamento, T.c_sector, T.d_sector FROM ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS as P, ORG51_SECTORES as T JOIN P.oi_departamento INNER T.oi_departamento WHERE T.oi_sector IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
